steps.title: Spot the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “But” and phrase “not all flying birds are so light” signal that the passage needs a counterexample—a flying bird that weighs significantly more than the “less than a kilogram” baseline established earlier.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content: The Dalmatian pelican qualifies: it's capable of flight and weighs 11.5 kg, directly supporting the “not all flying birds are so light” claim. A and C use a non-flying bird; B misrepresents the condor's weight. That confirms D is correct.
